---
title: "Interactive notebook"
subtitle: "Full Python analysis with code, outputs, and figures"
---

::: callout-note
The notebook below is the complete analysis used in this study. All cells, outputs, and figures are visible. The raw `.ipynb` file is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/DimitriPr/oil-shocks-equity-markets/blob/main/notebooks/analysis.ipynb) and can be cloned to re-run locally.
:::

<iframe src="notebooks/analysis.html" width="100%" height="900px" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 6px;"></iframe>

<p style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1rem;">
  <a href="notebooks/analysis.html" target="_blank">↗ Open notebook in a new tab</a>
</p>
